message:
feat: policy-aware tx prepare-phase approval gates with storage-backed evaluation

Wire the transaction prepare phase to real policy engine, approval store,
and target-state providers instead of the previous allow-all stub behavior.

Core additions in plan.rs:
- New `RequireApproval` variant in `TxPrepareOutcome` — surfaces approval
  requirements without hard-denying the transaction, allowing the caller
  to present approval UX and retry
- `TxPrepareEvaluationContext` — carries workspace, surface, workflow, and
  staleness config through gate evaluation
- `TxPreparePolicyAuthorizer` trait — abstracts policy engine access for
  prepare-phase gate checks (implemented for RefCell<PolicyEngine>)
- `TxPrepareApprovalChecker` trait — checks active approval tokens against
  scoped requirements (implemented via StorageBackedPrepareApprovalChecker)
- `TxPrepareTargetLookup` trait — resolves pane-level target snapshots for
  liveness checks (observed, stale, known-dead detection)
- `TxPrepareTargetSnapshot` — full pane state snapshot including capabilities,
  liveness timestamps, domain, reservation, and CWD
- `TxPrepareApprovalRequirement` — serializable approval scope attached to
  gate inputs when policy requires approval
- `mission_tx_prepare_gate_inputs` now accepts policy/approval/target providers
  and performs real per-step evaluation with pane-scoped liveness, reservation
  conflict detection, and approval requirement surfacing
- Old allow-all behavior preserved as `tx_prepare_gate_inputs_allow_all` for
  synthetic/test contexts
- `TxPrepareGateInput` gains `pane_id` and `required_approval` fields with
  serde skip-if-none annotations for backward-compatible serialization
- `TxPrepareReport` now includes `gate_inputs` for post-mortem inspection

Storage additions (storage.rs):
- `get_pane_blocking` — synchronous pane lookup for prepare-phase evaluation
- `get_active_reservation_blocking` — synchronous reservation check
- `has_active_approval_for_scope_blocking` — checks approval_tokens table for
  unexpired, unused tokens matching exact workspace/action/pane/fingerprint scope
- `query_active_approval_for_scope` — parameterized SQL with NULL-safe pane_id handling

Execution engine changes (tx_execution.rs):
- `StepExecutor::evaluate_gates` now takes `now_ms` for time-dependent checks
- New `PolicyPrepareStepExecutor<P, A, T>` — generic executor that wires real
  policy/approval/target providers while keeping deterministic commit/compensation
- `SyntheticStepExecutor` updated to use `tx_prepare_gate_inputs_allow_all`
- `RequireApproval` outcome maps to `MissionTxState::Planned` (re-evaluable)
- `record_prepare_gate_events` emits per-gate observability events with pass/fail
  status and reason codes for each of policy/reservation/approval/liveness

MCP and main.rs consumers updated to:
- Import renamed `tx_prepare_gate_inputs_allow_all`
- Handle `RequireApproval` outcome → `MissionTxState::Planned`
- Match on `&prepare_report.outcome` (borrow) instead of move

Tests:
- 10 new unit tests covering policy denial targeting, non-pane workflow steps,
  approval requirement surfacing, approval satisfaction, lookup failure handling,
  RequireApproval phase outcome, live/missing/stale/unobserved target liveness
- Mock implementations: MockPolicyAuthorizer, MockApprovalChecker, MockTargetLookup
- Existing tests updated for new TxPrepareGateInput fields and renamed function
- sc4_approval_timeout now expects RequireApproval instead of Deferred/Denied

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
